query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `followUpTasks` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `entityType` ENUM('appointment', 'lead', 'offerLead', 'campRegistration') NOT NULL,
  `entityId` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `status` ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  `priority` ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  `dueDate` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `assignedToId` INT,
  `assignedToName` VARCHAR(255),
  `createdById` INT NOT NULL,
  `createdByName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `completedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `completedById` INT,
  `completedByName` VARCHAR(255),
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `tasks_entity_idx` (`entityType`, `entityId`),
  INDEX `tasks_status_idx` (`status`),
  INDEX `tasks_dueDate_idx` (`dueDate`),
  INDEX `tasks_assignedTo_idx` (`assignedToId`)
);

  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `tasks_entity_idx` (`entityType`, `entityId`),
  INDEX `tasks_status_idx` (`status`),
  INDEX `tasks_dueDate_idx` (`dueDate`),
  INDEX `tasks_assignedTo_idx` (`assignedToId`)
);
